public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of deputy master in and around Mal Debt Conversion Office, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mal Debt Conversion Office workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Mal Debt Conversion Office, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Calia Brokerwell can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Calia Brokerwell needs help with a problem in Mal Debt Conversion Office that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Calia Brokerwell carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mal Debt Conversion Office: the part of Mal Debt Conversion Office where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
